highlights.title: Digital Pantheon: Simulating and Auditing Coalition Formation with LLM Agents
highlights.summary: Digital Pantheon simulates coalition formation with LLM agents.
highlights.detail: The framework combines Supervised Fine-Tuning, Direct Preference Optimization, and Retrieval-Augmented Generation to reconcile factual grounding with ideological alignment. It is operationalized on the 2019 Flemish election.

highlights.title: Bridge Evidence: Static Retrieval Utility Does Not Predict Causal Utility in Multi-Step Agentic Search
highlights.summary: Bridge Evidence measures the gap between static and causal utility in multi-step agentic search.
highlights.detail: The study uses a ReAct style agent over HotpotQA to replay 1000 development questions and compare the original run against its counterfactual. This gives a Counterfactual Trajectory Utility score from three deltas.

highlights.title: MM-IssueLoc: A Controlled Benchmark for Evaluating Visual Evidence in Multimodal Repository-Level Issue Localization
highlights.summary: MM-IssueLoc is a controlled benchmark for evaluating visual evidence in multimodal repository-level issue localization.
highlights.detail: MM-IssueLoc provides file-level and function-level gold labels, paired text-only and with-image evaluation, and VCE-based diagnostics. It is used to evaluate LLM-based and retrieval-based systems.

highlights.title: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Embed Ranks #1 Overall on RTEB, Advancing Agentic Retrieval
highlights.summary: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Embed ranks #1 on RTEB, advancing agentic retrieval.
highlights.detail: Nemotron 3 Embed is a significant advancement in agentic retrieval, demonstrating the power of NVIDIA's technology in this field.

highlights.title: Detecting LLM-Generated Texts with “Classical” Machine Learning
highlights.summary: Detecting LLM-Generated Texts with classical machine learning is discussed.
highlights.detail: The discussion focuses on the use of classical machine learning techniques to detect LLM-generated texts, highlighting the potential and limitations of this approach.

items.summary: Digital Pantheon simulates coalition formation with LLM agents.
items.detail: The framework combines Supervised Fine-Tuning, Direct Preference Optimization, and Retrieval-Augmented Generation to reconcile factual grounding with ideological alignment. It is operationalized on the 2019 Flemish election.

items.detail: The study uses a ReAct style agent over HotpotQA to replay 1000 development questions and compare the original run against its counterfactual. This gives a Counterfactual Trajectory Utility score from three deltas.

items.detail: MM-IssueLoc provides file-level and function-level gold labels, paired text-only and with-image evaluation, and VCE-based diagnostics. It is used to evaluate LLM-based and retrieval-based systems.

items.title: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Embed Ranks #1 Overall on RTEB, Advancing Agentic Retrieval
items.summary: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Embed ranks #1 on RTEB, advancing agentic retrieval.
items.detail: Nemotron 3 Embed is a significant advancement in agentic retrieval, demonstrating the power of NVIDIA's technology in this field.

items.title: Detecting LLM-Generated Texts with “Classical” Machine Learning
items.summary: Detecting LLM-Generated Texts with classical machine learning is discussed.
items.detail: The discussion focuses on the use of classical machine learning techniques to detect LLM-generated texts, highlighting the potential and limitations of this approach.

items.title: How Cars24 scales conversations and builds faster with OpenAI
items.summary: Cars24 uses OpenAI-powered voice and chat agents to handle conversations.
items.detail: Cars24's use of OpenAI-powered agents has led to significant improvements in their conversation handling capabilities, enabling them to recover lost leads and streamline their workflows.

items.title: The LLM Critics Are Right. I Use LLMs Anyway
items.summary: The author discusses their use of LLMs despite criticism.
items.detail: The author shares their personal experience with using LLMs, highlighting the benefits and challenges they have encountered, and why they continue to use them despite criticism.

items.title: Jul 9, 2026 Case Study UST is bringing Claude to physical AI
items.summary: UST brings Claude to physical AI on Jul 9, 2026.
items.detail: The integration of Claude with physical AI is expected to have significant implications for the field, enabling new applications and use cases.

items.title: Our approach to bioresilience
items.summary: Google DeepMind and Isomorphic Labs share their approach to bioresilience.
items.detail: The joint approach focuses on developing AI models that can withstand and adapt to biological challenges, with potential applications in various fields.

items.title: Product Jun 30, 2026 Introducing Claude Sonnet 5 Sonnet 5 delivers frontier performance across coding, agents, and professional work at scale.
items.summary: Anthropic introduces Claude Sonnet 5 on Jun 30, 2026.
items.detail: Claude Sonnet 5 delivers frontier performance across coding, agents, and professional work at scale, marking a significant advancement in the field.

items.title: Security updates for Thursday
items.summary: Security updates are issued for various Linux distributions.
items.detail: The security updates address vulnerabilities in several packages, including cups, git-lfs, and kernel, and are available for multiple Linux distributions.

items.title: [$] Sched-ext: enqueue() for sub-schedulers and proxy-execution support
items.summary: Sched-ext adds enqueue() for sub-schedulers and proxy-execution support.
items.detail: The extensible scheduler class (sched_ext) allows for custom CPU schedulers as BPF programs, and the new features enhance its capabilities and compatibility.

items.title: A Sloshing-Mercury-Powered Neon Light
items.summary: Jean Picard noticed a glow in a barometer
items.detail: The glow was caused by sloshing mercury in 1675

items.title: A USB Port by Any Other Color…
items.summary: Generic USB 3.0 hub lacks IC
items.detail: The hub was bought on an Asian website

items.title: Bad Apple on a Karaoke Machine
items.summary: CD+Graphics format didn't catch on
items.detail: It packed graphics and lyrics into music discs

items.title: Even Chemical Bonds Obey Einstein’s Relativity
items.summary: Einstein's Relativity applies to chemical bonds
items.detail: It's typically associated with large and heavy things

items.title: Ground-Side Mission Plan Compilation with Policy-as-Code Guardrails for Cloud-Native Satellite Platforms
items.summary: Satellite Mission Compiler is a four-stage pipeline
items.detail: It compiles human-authored mission plans into container-workflow artifacts

items.title: Mech: Mechanised Choreographic Programming
items.summary: Mech is a mechanised choreographic programming
items.detail: It's for correct-by-construction development of concurrent systems

items.title: PolyQ: Codesigning End-to-End Quantization Framework for Scalable Edge CPU LLM Inference
items.summary: PolyQ is a CPU-oriented compiler/quantization co-design
items.detail: It assigns per-channel bit-widths for activation-aware channel-wise bit allocation

items.title: EdgeFaaS: A Function-based Framework for Edge Computing
items.summary: EdgeFaaS is a function-based edge computing framework
items.detail: It enables edge applications to utilize heterogeneous resources

items.title: CODA: Algorithm-Hardware Co-design for Edge Video Diffusion via NMP-Enabled Compute-Cache Operator Disaggregation
items.summary: CODA is an algorithm-hardware co-design for edge video diffusion
items.detail: It reduces redundant computation using Cross-Timestep Caching

items.title: Don't Predict, Prioritize: Rethinking GPU Reliability Assessment
items.summary: GPU reliability assessment is rethought
items.detail: Instead of predicting failure timing, it prioritizes nodes by failure risk

items.title: aseprite/aseprite
items.summary: Aseprite is an animated sprite editor
items.detail: It's available for Windows, macOS, and Linux

items.title: embassy-rs/embassy
items.summary: Embassy is a modern embedded framework
items.detail: It uses Rust and async for embedded systems development

items.title: vercel-labs/agent-browser
items.summary: Vercel Labs releases Agent Browser, a CLI for AI agent browser automation.
items.detail: This tool enables automation of browser interactions for AI agents, potentially simplifying testing and deployment. It is written in Rust.

items.title: AlexsJones/llmfit
items.summary: AlexsJones introduces llmfit, a command to find suitable models for hardware.
items.detail: Llmfit simplifies the process of finding compatible models by providing a unified interface to explore various providers and models. This can save time and effort for developers.

items.title: ArduPilot/ardupilot
items.summary: ArduPilot repository contains source code for ArduPlane, ArduCopter, and more.
items.detail: The ArduPilot project provides open-source software for various autonomous vehicles, including planes, copters, rovers, and subs. It is written in C++.

items.title: Fincept-Corporation/FinceptTerminal
items.summary: FinceptTerminal offers advanced finance analytics and research tools.
items.detail: FinceptTerminal is designed to provide users with interactive and data-driven decision-making capabilities. It includes market analytics, investment research, and economic data tools in a user-friendly environment.
